case_title: FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC. VS. MICHAEL FREDENBERG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FREDENBERG, MICHAEL DBA SPRINGLING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-11-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD SPRINGLINE, INC. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINGLINE INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00- SERVED AUG-18-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINGLINE INC
REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE HEARING (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC.
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT TO DEFENDANT'S NAME IN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC.
(SC-150) REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - DECLARATION FOR RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARY KIRSTINNE T IBAY--ACCOUNTS MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 SERVED JUN-08-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FREDENBERG, MICHAEL DBA SPRINGLING INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINGLINE INC $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,660.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-14-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY FINE LINE SAWING & DRILLING, INC.
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT/ RETURN TO SENDER
